name: calculate_shipping
description: Calculate estimated shipping cost for a destination and weight using available routes.

name: list_shipments
description: List all current shipments with their tracking numbers, status, origin, destination, and details. No parameters required.

name: track_shipment
description: Track the current status and location of a shipment by its tracking number.

tracking_number.description: The unique tracking number of the shipment.

name: get_route
description: Retrieve information about a specific logistics route including distance, estimated time, and status.

route_id.description: The unique identifier of the route.

route_name.description: The name of the route if the ID is unknown.
